stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)) ↔ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)
priority_rationale: Strong equivalence characterizing Gödel-fixpoint existence via a modal identity.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x : α}, Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) → x ≐ ⊠x
priority_rationale: Useful transfer lemma from equivalence with ⊠⊤ to a fixpoint property, but mostly local.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ¬ (⊬ □g.1)
priority_rationale: Natural consistency consequence for Gödel fixpoints with some reuse, but not a major theory bridge.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α}, h.1 ≤ ⊠h.1 → h.1 ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)
priority_rationale: Looks like a short axiom-level corollary for Henkin fixpoints, with limited standalone value.
